reconciliation.horizontal: The first focused protocol exposed an inverse rotation-only cue. After inverting the horizontal head coefficient and rerendering the complete direction rows, three fresh 3x semantic blind reviewers unanimously passed the repaired pair.
reconciliation.vertical: All three final 3x semantic blind reviewers passed; the complete head control also has the required screen-Y sign.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: inverted horizontal complete-head rotation before final rerender
